answers.allocated_relations: 154 allocation rows; 139 unique positive-eta relations after merging duplicate relation rows across pattern groups; merged eta_integer sum 20000
answers.direct_command_or_log_evidence_for_produ: not found in copied workspace; downstream execution logs confirm consumption but not generation/export of the 5k allocation
answers.most_likely_producer_script: src/statistics/hop_pattern_analysis_dashboard.py using src/kg_building/bidirectional_triple_allocation.py::allocate_for_patterns; exported through Streamlit download_button and manually renamed/copied to bidirectional_allocation_results5k.json
answers.safe_thesis_claim: The final B0 graph was evaluated against the canonical 5k allocation artifact at src/Pruning graph/bidirectional_allocation_results5k.json; this artifact is byte-identical to the archived Hetzner input, contains integer eta quotas for 139 unique allocated relations after duplicate-row merging, and records the threshold/matrix configuration used for allocation.
answers.schema_summary: dict with config, eta_per_group, pattern_groups, relations_universe, allocations; allocations rows contain relation, pattern, eta_expected, eta_integer, eta_total, forward/backward scores, probabilities, and relation_dom_rng_class
answers.support_matrix_linkage: partial: archived Phase II config and run manifest use genericity_support_matrix.adjacency_support.json; dashboard code exports this matrix over current positive-eta allocation relations, but allocation JSON does not embed the support matrix path/hash and no same-run export command was found
answers.unsafe_thesis_claim: The canonical 5k allocation can be regenerated exactly from a logged dashboard command or complete manifest; no such command/export log was found in the copied workspace.
answers.upstream_phase_i_artifacts_appear_to_fee: dashboard code defaults point to hop_support_v2 JSONL and composition_verified.compact JSONL, and loads wikidata ontology property metadata; the 5k allocation file itself does not embed input paths or hashes

sample_rows: network the infrastructure is a part of
type to which this subject corresponds/belongs. Different from P279 (subclass of); for example: K2 is an instance of mountain; volcano is a subclass of mountain
located in the administrative territorial entity

the item is located on the territory of the following administrative entity. Use P276 for specifying locations that are non-administrative places and for items about events. Use P1382 if the item falls only partially into the administrative entity

key_line_references.evidence: run_phase3_allocation builds W and calls allocate_for_patterns.
eta_per_group, relation universe, matrix mode, and allocation call are assembled in the dashboard.
allocation rows include pattern, relation, eta_total, scores/probabilities, eta_expected, eta_integer.
dashboard exports positive-eta genericity matrix and allocation JSON/CSV via download buttons.
allocation algorithm computes eta_expected and eta_integer and exposes allocate_for_patterns.
config comments say allocation JSON and genericity matrix are exported from the dashboard and should be kept paired.
production Phase II config points to bidirectional_allocation_results5k.json and genericity_support_matrix.adjacency_support.json.

notes: Stage11/Stage12 manifests contain stale /home/kg_benchmark/src/kg_builder/input/bidirectional_allocation_results5k.json paths that are mapped to the local canonical file by prior path-translation work.

evidence_classification.algorithm_code_path_evidence: confirmed for implementation; inferred for this exact exported file
evidence_classification.command_log_evidence: missing for export; confirmed for downstream consumption

remaining_gaps: No exact Streamlit command or saved dashboard state was found for the 5k allocation export.
The allocation JSON does not embed input file paths or input hashes for hop support, composition verification, ontology metadata, or support matrix.
The genericity support matrix used by Phase II is co-located and code-compatible, but no direct same-run export manifest links it cryptographically to the 5k allocation JSON.
The selected thresholds are preserved inside the allocation config, but the interactive UI state and any manual rename/copy step are not manifested.
Exact Phase I-to-allocation rerun reproducibility remains incomplete until a wrapper/config captures dashboard inputs, thresholds, support matrix mode, and output hashes.
